trigger.description: ee invoked with --redaction <level> against a workspace containing memory content that matches a secret detector class (api_key, jwt, stripe_secret, aws_secret_access_key, password, oauth_token, private_key, ssh_key, service_account_json). The surface emits redaction_pattern_matched as an informational signal per redaction event so the caller can see which class fired and at which level.
setup_commands: ee remember 'API_KEY=sk-FAKE_abc123def456 - rotate before release.' --workspace . --level procedural --kind rule --json --allow-secret-mention

notes: The redaction event itself is non-fatal; severity is medium because the agent should KNOW the response was rewritten. After E5, a presence marker in capabilities.available also reflects which detector classes are enabled in this build.
